---
title: "Contact"
pagetitle: "Contact — Arvind Karunakaran"
description: "How to reach Arvind Karunakaran at Stanford University."
---

::: {.stack-list}
- [Email]{.year}<br>
  [arvindka@stanford.edu](mailto:arvindka@stanford.edu)
- [Department]{.year}<br>
  Management Science & Engineering, Stanford University
- [Mailing address]{.year}<br>
  Huang Engineering Center, 475 Via Ortega, Stanford, CA 94305<br>
  [(Office / mail code — update in `contact.qmd`)]{.pub-meta}
- [ORCID]{.year}<br>
  [0000-0002-6755-5815](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-6755-5815)
- [Google Scholar]{.year}<br>
  [Google Scholar profile](https://scholar.google.com/){.no-underline} [(replace with your profile URL)]{.pub-meta}
- [Administrative contact]{.year}<br>
  Jenny Lam — [lamjenny@stanford.edu](mailto:lamjenny@stanford.edu)
:::

For prospective students: please review my [research](research.qmd) and
[publications](publications.qmd) before getting in touch.
